title: echinofossulocactus crispatus f. ensifer
side_effects: Echinofossulocactus crispatus f. ensifer can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In addition, it can cause allergic reactions, such as skin irritation, hives, and itching. Overuse of the plant or its extracts may also lead to more severe side effects, including headaches, dizziness, and respiratory problems. Furthermore, improper use may interact with certain medications, exacerbating pre-existing health conditions or causing adverse reactions.
